name: ghostshift
description: GhostShift freemium web app, browser extension, and always-on subscription backend prototype.

scripts.check: node --check ./backend/server.mjs && node --check ./account.js && node --check ./script.js && node --check ./service-worker.js && node --check ./demo-player.js && node --check ./extension-chrome-edge/content.js && node --check ./extension-chrome-edge/popup.js && node --check ./extension-chrome-edge/options.js
